message:
fix(ci): fix 2 Windows-specific test failures (#3103)

Cherry-pick unique fixes from #3103 (shared hunks already landed in #3096):
- TestFetchClosedBeads: Windows .cmd stub uses `type` + data file instead
  of `echo` for multi-line JSON output
- TestWorktreeGitdirCheck_DeaconDogs: normalize path separators with
  filepath.ToSlash before checking for deacon/dogs/alpha

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
